title: pneumatopteris microloncha
intro: Pneumatopteris microloncha is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia. The plant has been found to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Pneumatopteris microloncha is prepared as a tea or infusion, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, headache, and respiratory problems.
